title: Oh The Bares We've Boned (BWG x Bare Bones)
description: Stylization of the wonderful Oh The Biomes We've Gone Mod to fit with Bare Bones. See the world through a simple lens.
body:
## More Biomes. More Bare Bones. 

Reducing the textures of the beloved Oh The Biomes We've Gone mod to work with Bare Bones. See the pack in a style like the trailers. 

![A shot of some of the bare boned textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9cb1ca6d203883f6944329690005700dc423d5b.jpeg)

## Compatibility

Currently, there are plans and operations for making versions for relatively recent versions of Minecraft. Expect that soon.

## Instructions and Links

Intended for use of the Bare Bones resource pack, Bare Bones - Better Leaves, and the Oh The Biomes We've Gone mod, all made by amazingly talented folk.

## Contact

You can find me in the Bare Bones Discord Server. 

Username: venenoir

Display Name: Rosie

I have a [Google Issue Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSexYWUHry04VcV9PAKD4-wxOazOoZSYTFQ6iMBtzwY4z45nSw/viewform?usp=dialog) for criticism and issue reports! Please feel free to leave constructive criticism and report issues here!
